note_main_file: id=31 Efficiency (spec_tree=-1) — all-ones, carrier=13165 (Aspect of the Hawk). AotH confirmed SPELLFAMILY_HUNTER [1048576,0,0]. All-ones acceptable — WotLK Efficiency reduces pet attack mana costs; pet spells are SPELLFAMILY_GENERIC and cannot be targeted by Hunter SpellMod; all-ones reduces all Hunter player spell costs as the only viable approximation.
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Hunter family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.

Thick Hide (3r, tier 1) — Increases armor of pet and player by 4/7/10%. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes._notes: Efficiency (5r, tier 2) is id=31 in talent_affixes.json. All-ones, carrier AotH(13165) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_HUNTER. verified=true.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Revive Pet
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16777216,0,0]=0x01000000 (mask0 bit24). No shared Hunter marker bits. Revive Pet cast time -2s/rank (CASTING_TIME FLAT: -2000ms).

talent_affixes._todo: Aspect Mastery (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Unleashed Fury (5r, tier 4) — Increases pet damage by 4/8/12/16/20%. Passive pet stat, not implementable as player SpellMod.
Ferocity (5r, tier 4) — Increases crit chance of pet by 2/4/6/8/10%. Passive pet stat, not implementable as player SpellMod.
Spirit Bond (2r, tier 5) — Regenerates 1/2% HP for you and your pet every 10 sec while in combat. Passive regen, not implementable as SpellMod.
Intimidation (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Bestial Discipline (2r, tier 5) — Increases Focus regeneration of pet by 25/50%. Pet stat, not implementable as player SpellMod.
Animal Handler (2r, tier 6) — Increases max number of pet training points by 4/8. Passive pet stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Frenzy (5r, tier 6) — After your pet crits, it gains 8/16/24/32/40% attack speed for next 8 sec. Proc-based attack speed, not implementable as SpellMod.
Ferocious Inspiration (3r, tier 6) — Your pet's crits increase your and party's damage by 1/2/3%. Proc/aura buff, not implementable as SpellMod.
Bestial Wrath (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Serpent's Swiftness (5r, tier 7) — Increases ranged and pet attack speed by 2/4/6/8/10%. Passive attack speed, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,33554432,8]: OR of BestialWrath(19574) mask1 bit25(0x02000000=33554432)|Intimidation(19577) mask2 bit3(0x00000008=8). Spans all three masks — no shared Hunter marker bits. Bestial Wrath and Intimidation cooldown -10%/rank (COOLDOWN PCT: -10).
